prompt: Review the Header.tsx and its navigation components for potential state-driven re-renders. Suggest how to optimize the rendering tree.

assertions.evidence: Subagent identified that toggling the mobile menu state triggered re-renders of the entire desktop navigation.

assertions.text: Suggests extracting sub-components into standalone memoized parts
assertions.evidence: Subagent recommended extracting DesktopNav and MobileMenu into standalone memoized components.
Subagent identified and removed unused useRouter calls.
